user.description: The object containing user data (See OpenRTB spec)

device.description: The object containing device data (See OpenRTB spec)

site.description: The object containing site data (See OpenRTB spec)

app.description: The object containing app data (See OpenRTB spec)

test.description: Flag which will induce a sample bid response when true; only set to true for testing purposes (1 = true, 0 = false)

at.description: Auction type, where 1 = First Price, 2 = Second Price Plus

tmax.description: Maximum time in milliseconds the exchange allows for bids to be received including Internet latency to avoid timeout

wseat.description: White list of buyer seats (e.g., advertisers, agencies) allowed to bid on this impression

bseat.description: Block list of buyer seats (e.g., advertisers, agencies) restricted from bidding on this impression

allimps.description: Flag to indicate that the impressions offered represent all the impressions available in context (1 = true, 0 = false)

wlang.description: White list of languages for creatives

bcat.description: Blocked advertiser categories using the IAB content categories

badv.description: Block list of advertisers by their domains

bapp.description: Block list of applications by their platform-specific exchange independent application identifiers

source.description: A Source object that provides data about the inventory source and which entity makes the final decision (See OpenRTB spec)

ext.description: An extension object that allows for custom fields and objects to be sent  (See OpenRTB spec)
